assertions.title: Batch form rows each have autocomplete

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8000
steps.observed: Page loaded with batch form containing one token row

steps.action: Type 'DAI' in first batch token input
steps.observed: Dropdown showed 'DAI — Dai Stablecoin (0x6B17...1d0F)' from Uniswap Labs Default

steps.action: Click '+ Add Token' to add new row
steps.observed: New row added with its own token input

steps.action: Type 'USDC' in second batch token input
steps.observed: Dropdown showed 'USDC — USDCoin (0xA0b8...eB48)' from Uniswap Labs Default, independent from first row

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8000 and scroll to Token Classification form
steps.observed: Token Classification form visible with Token Address input

steps.action: Type 'WETH' in bucket token input
steps.observed: Dropdown showed 'WETH — Wrapped Ether (0xC02a...5Cc2)' from Uniswap Labs Default

steps.action: Type 'USD' in token input to get multiple results
steps.observed: 15 tokens displayed including USD1, USDC, USDG, USDP, USDT, etc.

steps.action: Press ArrowDown
steps.observed: USD1 (index 0) highlighted with 'highlighted' CSS class

steps.action: Press ArrowDown again
steps.observed: USDC (index 1) highlighted

steps.action: Press ArrowUp
steps.observed: USD1 (index 0) highlighted again

steps.action: Press Escape
steps.observed: Dropdown closed, no autocomplete dropdowns visible

steps.action: Type 'USDC' and press ArrowDown then Enter
steps.expected: USDC selected, address filled, dropdown closed
steps.observed: Input filled with 0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48, dropdown closed

steps.action: Type 'DAI' and press Tab
steps.expected: Dropdown closes, focus moves to next field
steps.observed: Dropdown closed, focus moved to price-block field

assertions.title: No autocomplete trigger on pre-filled values

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8000 (has pre-filled DAI address)
steps.expected: No autocomplete dropdown visible on load
steps.observed: Page loaded with DAI address pre-filled, no autocomplete dropdown visible

steps.action: Check for autocomplete elements on page
steps.observed: 0 elements matching autocomplete-related selectors found on initial load

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8000/?chain=ethereum&token=0x6B...&block=12345
steps.expected: No autocomplete dropdown triggered by URL params
steps.observed: 3 autocomplete-dropdown elements exist but all have display:none and 0 children

assertions.title: Removing batch row with active autocomplete

steps.action: Type 'WBTC' in batch token input to open autocomplete
steps.observed: Dropdown showed 'WBTC — Wrapped BTC (0x2260...C599)' from Uniswap Labs Default

steps.action: Click × (remove) button while dropdown is open
steps.observed: Row removed cleanly, 0 visible autocomplete dropdowns, 0 token rows remaining

steps.action: Type 'XYZNONEXISTENT' in token input
steps.expected: Dropdown shows 'No matches' or doesn't appear
steps.observed: Dropdown displayed with single child showing 'No matches' text

steps.action: Verify no empty container
steps.observed: Dropdown has 1 child (the 'No matches' message), not empty

assertions.title: Adjacent fields preserved after autocomplete selection

steps.action: Fill adjacent fields: block=18000000, amount=100, ignorePools=0x1234567890abcdef
steps.observed: All three fields populated with correct values

steps.action: Type 'USDT' in token input and select via ArrowDown+Enter
steps.expected: Token address filled, adjacent fields preserved
steps.observed: Token filled with 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7, block=18000000, amount=100, ignorePools=0x1234567890abcdef — all preserved

frictions.description: Pressing Escape or Tab while focused on the page sometimes navigates the browser to about:blank in headless mode, requiring a page reload to continue testing
frictions.resolution: Navigated back to http://localhost:8000 after each occurrence

frictions.description: The agent-browser 'fill' command on the price-token input sometimes fails with CSS selector errors after certain interactions, requiring use of JavaScript eval to set values instead
frictions.resolution: Used eval() to programmatically set input values and dispatch input events

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. Batch form rows have independent autocomplete (VAL-AUTO-010), bucket form has autocomplete (VAL-AUTO-011), keyboard navigation works correctly with ArrowUp/Down/Enter/Escape/Tab (VAL-AUTO-013), pre-filled values don't trigger autocomplete on load (VAL-AUTO-014), removing batch rows with active autocomplete leaves no orphaned dropdowns (VAL-AUTO-015), no-match state shows 'No matches' message (VAL-AUTO-016), and adjacent form fields are preserved after autocomplete selection (VAL-AUTO-017).
